data.title: Cherry Blossoms Aren't the Only Thing in Full Bloom This Spring: CASEKOO Debuts LinKOO, the World's First Open Clasp System
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 13, 2026, CASEKOO, a top company in cutting-edge mobile lifestyle accessories, revealed the introduction of LinKOO, a revolutionary phone case showcasing the globe's initial open clasp system. LinKOO, designed to reflect the lively spirit and joy of Spring, offers customers a groundbreaking experience in phone case technology.
Trump administration set to receive 10 billion fee for brokering TikTok deal - WSJ

data.title: SmartCentres Real Estate Investment Trust Further Extends Arrangements with Penguin Group
data.description: In Toronto, the Board of Trustees of SmartCentres Real Estate Investment Trust (SRU.UN) has extended existing arrangements as per the press release from February 27, 2026. The agreements were extended until April 16, 2026. This extension allows more time for finalizing the agreements. The Trust is optimistic about the progress and cooperation between the parties involved.
US TO RECEIVE $10B FEE FOR BROKERING TIKTOK DEAL, WSJ REPORTS

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Prices, Iran War Drive Stocks Lower; Nvidia GTC, Micron Earnings Due
data.description: Stock market experienced a decline for the third consecutive week as key levels were broken or tested, with oil prices surging due to the Iran war situation. Investors are anticipating the upcoming Nvidia GTC and Micron earnings announcements. Dow Jones Futures have been impacted by the rise in oil prices and tensions in Iran, leading to a decrease in stock value. This information is significant for those closely following the market trends, as it provides insights into the current economic landscape.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Sinks Below Key Level As War Stokes Volatility, Adobe Plunges (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected inflation and GDP figures. Adobe's stock took a significant dive after reporting its earnings. The Nasdaq dropped below a crucial threshold amidst increased volatility driven by concerns over war. Live coverage of these events is available through Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: BLS Overcounts Again; U.S. Has Lost Jobs Under Trump Tariffs, 'Gold Standard' Shows
data.description: The most recent reliable jobs data indicates another adjustment may be needed from the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS). It is suggested that the BLS has overestimated job numbers, revealing that the U.S. may have actually experienced job losses as a result of the tariffs imposed during the Trump administration. This updated information, considered to be the 'gold standard', highlights discrepancies in previously reported job figures.

data.title: Star Equity Holdings to Release Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results on March 17
data.description: In Old Greenwich, Connecticut, on March 13, 2026, Star Equity Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: STRR and STRRP), previously known as Hudson Global, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSON and HSONP), disclosed plans to unveil its Q4 financial report for the period ending December 31, 2025. The diversified holding company intends to make this information public after the market closes on Tuesday, March 17, 2026.

data.title: Spirit Airlines Announces Restructuring Support Agreement and Plan of Reorganization
data.description: Spirit Aviation Holdings, Inc., the parent company of Spirit Airlines, LLC, anticipates emerging from Chapter 11 bankruptcy by early summer. The company, based in Dania Beach, Florida, revealed its plans to file a Restructuring Support Agreement on March 13, 2026. By finalizing this crucial step, Spirit aims to facilitate its journey out of bankruptcy and back to stability. The timeline set suggests that the emergence process should be completed within the next few months. This development signifies a significant achievement for the company and its stakeholders, showcasing a positive direction for Spirit as it navigates through financial challenges.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Give Up Intraday Gains As Middle East Tensions Rattle Markets
data.description: Bitcoin saw a decrease in value amid rising military tensions in the Middle East. The latest cryptocurrency prices are Bitcoin at $71,191, Ethereum at $2,106, Solana at $88.83, XRP at $1.39, Dogecoin at $0.09586, and Shiba Inu at $0.005951. Coinglass data revealed that 107,056 traders were liquidated, resulting in a total loss of $450.16 million in the past 24 hours. SoSoValue reported net inflows of $53.9 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $115.9 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Thursday. Top gainers in the last day were OFFICIAL TRUMP, Render, and DeXe. Noteworthy events include the postponement of the Token2049 Crypto Conference in Dubai due to safety concerns amid ongoing Iran strikes. A Circle executive predicted that the next phase for crypto will focus on payments, not trading. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. March 2026 Dividend Announcement and February 28, 2026 Financial Update
data.description: Atlanta, March 13, 2026 - Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) declared a cash dividend of $0.12 per common stock share for March 2026. The dividend is set to be paid on April 14, 2026 to shareholders recorded...

data.title: Pega Named a Leader in Customer Service Solutions by Independent Research Firm
data.description: In WALTHAM, Mass., Pegasystems Inc. (NASDAQ: PEGA) has been recognized as a leader in customer service solutions by Forrester Research in Q1 2026. Out of 31 evaluation criteria, Pega achieved the highest scores in 16, showcasing its strengths in autonomous service provision. The report highlights Pegasystem's comprehensive case management system that effectively coordinates workflows across various channels and throughout the enterprise. This distinction underscores Pega's commitment to innovative and top-tier customer service offerings.

data.title: Aquestive Therapeutics Announces Grant of Inducement Award Pursuant to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On March 9, 2026, Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed an inducement grant for Matthew Greenhawt, MD, MBA, MSc, who serves as the Chief Medical Officer of the company. This grant falls under the 2022 Equity Inducement Plan of Aquestive. The pharmaceutical company, traded as AQST on the NASDAQ stock exchange, is dedicated to advancing medicines using innovative science and delivery technologies to enhance the lives of patients. The Compensation Committee of the company gave the approval for this grant.

data.title: Dianthus Therapeutics, Inc. Announces Proposed $400 Million Underwritten Public Offering
data.description: Dianthus Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company based in New York and Waltham, Mass., has announced the launch of an underwritten public offering. The company aims to raise $400 million through the sale of shares of its common stock or pre-funded warrants to purchase common stock. Additionally, Dianthus plans to provide the underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional $60 million of common stock. The offering's completion and final terms are subject to market conditions. All securities in this offering are being issued by Dianthus.

data.title: 26Health Acquires Optimal Integrative Care, Expanding Access to Integrated Healthcare in Atlanta
data.description: A recent acquisition has been made to enhance access to infectious disease, primary care, and integrated healthcare services for patients in the Atlanta region. The acquisition was completed by 26Health, a well-established provider of primary care and mental health services in the Southeast. This development was announced on March 13, 2026, in Orlando, Florida. The move is expected to significantly expand healthcare options for Atlanta residents and strengthen the overall healthcare landscape in the area.
News article: Transparency notification issued, revealing 12% stake acquisition in a prominent company.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains As Trump Says Iran War Is 'Very Complete'; Cruise Stock Soars (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw a rebound from earlier lows in the stock market. This increase was attributed to the surge in oil prices resulting from tensions surrounding the U.S.-Iran conflict. Notably, Nvidia had a strong performance while Hims experienced a significant increase. The positive sentiment in the market was further fueled by President Trump's statement about the 'very complete' status of the Iran war. Additionally, cruise stock soared during the day's trading session.

data.title: Home BancShares, Inc. Announces First Quarter Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: In Conway, Arkansas, on March 13, 2026, Home BancShares, Inc., the parent company of Centennial Bank, disclosed their plans to unveil their First Quarter 2026 financial results on April 15, 2026, after the market closes. Subsequently, management is scheduled to host a conference call on April 16, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. CT (2:00 p.m. ET) to discuss these earnings. Home BancShares is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HOMB.

data.title: Oculis Publishes Notifications of Transactions by Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities
data.description: In Zug, Switzerland, on March 13, 2026, it was announced that notifications were released regarding trades conducted by a member of the Company's executive committee under a 10b5-1 trading plan. These trades were made in compliance with Rule 10b5-1(c)(1) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. The specific numbers and details of these trades have not been disclosed.

data.title: Sunset World Group Celebrates International Women's Day by Recognizing the Strength and Leadership of its Female Employees
data.description: In Cancun, Mexico on March 13, 2026, Sunset World Group organized a set of unique activities across all its properties - Hacienda Tres Ríos, Sunset Royal, Sunset Marina, Sunset Fishermen, Ocean Spa, and Laguna Suites - to commemorate International Women's Day. The events aimed to acknowledge the significant contribution...
